name: WFBE_NEURODEF_FORT_OP_EAST
notes: OBSERVATION POST — MANNED EAST variant (flag WFBE_C_DEF_FORT_MANNED). Mirrors the WEST manned layout: one manned DShKM (DSHKM_TK_INS_EP1) on the watchtower deck at the documented Land_Fort_Watchtower_EP1 DECK_Z=5.4 (see WEST variant notes for the lift mechanics). EAST prop flavour: Land_CamoNetVar_EAST net (used by WFBE_NEURODEF_ARTILLERYRADAR_EAST) and TKBasicAmmunitionBox_EP1 cache — both already in the mission tree.

objs.role: ELEVATED OBSERVATION — bunker-tower, long view over the approach
concealment — breaks the tower silhouette (front, ground level; deck gun fires over it)
low fallback ring at the base (self-defence, not a bastion)
supply cache — low, behind the tower
MANNED DShKM — ON the watchtower deck (z=5.4 = documented Land_Fort_Watchtower_EP1 DECK_Z), long frontal arc
